---
title: "Contact"
---

# 📬 Contact Me

📧 Email: zb082101@gmail.com  
📞 Phone: +1 646-284-1928  
📍 Location: Boston, MA  

---

## 🌐 Professional Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/zhuolunwu  
- GitHub: https://github.com/AllenWu020420  

---

## 🤝 Let's Connect

I am open to:

- Data Analyst roles  
- Business Analytics internships  
- Research collaboration  

Feel free to reach out!
